title: That Man in Istanbul
writer: Giovanni Simonelli, Nat Wachsberger, Lluís Josep Comerón
actors: Horst Buchholz, Sylva Koscina, Ángel Picazo
plot: When a hostage-for-ransom exchange goes wrong, the F.B.I. sends an agent to Turkey to retrieve the ransom money and the hostage who's an important nuclear-weapon scientist.
